SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JON RIGHTHOUSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIGHTHOUSE, JON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,044.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,124.00, SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
